Evolve Church Presents

Your money.

A hands-on workshop where biblical wisdom meets practical strategy — so you can manage money with confidence, build real wealth, and leave something that lasts.

Register Now — It's Free July 18th  ·  10:00 AM

The Real Issue

Most people know they should do better with money.
They just don't know how.

Nobody taught you this stuff. Church gave you the why — "be a good steward" — but never the how. So you're doing your best with half the picture, and the stress doesn't go away.

  • You work hard every month but there's never enough left over to save or invest.
  • Debt feels like a permanent ceiling — you pay it down, and somehow it climbs back up.
  • You want to leave something for your kids, but you can't see a clear path to get there.
  • You feel guilty about money, like wanting more is somehow unspiritual.

What You'll Walk Away With

Three areas. One cohesive framework.

This isn't another motivational talk. Every session is built around practical tools you can apply the week after you leave.

01
Purpose

When your financial decisions are rooted in God's vision for your life, money stops being a source of anxiety and starts becoming a tool.

  • Reframe how you think about money and God
  • Identify what a purpose-driven financial life looks like for you
  • Make decisions from vision, not fear
02
Wealth

Practical, no-fluff strategies for getting your financial house in order — from your budget to your credit score to your savings.

  • Build a budget that actually works for your life
  • Understand credit and use it to your advantage
  • Create a real debt payoff strategy
03
Legacy

Wise stewardship isn't just about today. It's about building something your children and grandchildren can stand on.

  • Introduction to investing and long-term planning
  • How to pass wealth — not just stuff — to the next generation
  • Stewardship as an act of worship

Common Questions

Good questions deserve straight answers.

Do I need to be in a financial crisis to benefit from this?

Not at all. Whether you're living paycheck to paycheck or already have savings, this workshop meets you where you are. The frameworks apply regardless of your starting point — because it's about building the right foundation, not fixing an emergency.

Is this only for people who are already members of Evolve?

Everyone is welcome. You don't need to attend Evolve Church or have any church background to come and get real value out of this workshop. Bring a friend.

Is it actually free? What's the catch?

It's genuinely free. No upsell at the end, no offering pitch in the middle. This is Evolve investing in the financial health of our community. All you need to bring is yourself and something to take notes with.

Will this be too basic if I've already read financial books or taken courses?

This workshop closes the gap between knowing and doing. Most people who've read the books still haven't built a system they stick to. The biblical lens and community accountability piece is what makes this different — and stickier.
